title: Azure Skyline
prompt:
Create a modern 158-second Electro Pop song for a web radio / web TV broadcast. 

Mood: Optimistic, Uplifting, Energetic
Tempo: 120 BPM.
Style: Radio-ready, clean, streaming-ready, catchy hooks.
Production: Pristine, polished, layered synths, tight percussion.
Instruments: Synthesizers (pads, leads, arpeggiated sequences), drum machine (punchy kick, crisp snare, hi-hats), bass synth, processed vocals, subtle vocal harmonies.

Structure:
0:00 - 0:12 intro: Gentle synth pad swells in, building anticipation with a subtle arpeggio.
0:12 - 0:44 verse/groove: Driving bassline and programmed drums establish the groove. Vocal enters with a mellow, almost whispered delivery.
0:44 - 1:00 build/pre-chorus: Filter sweeps and rising synth sequences build intensity, drums become more complex.
1:00 - 1:31 chorus/drop/main hook: Energetic, soaring synth lead melody and layered vocals. Big, impactful drum hits.
1:31 - 2:03 second verse or soft bridge: Similar to the first verse, but with a slightly different synth texture.  Vocal delivery is more confident.
2:03 - 2:30 final chorus/drop/main hook:  Repetition of the main hook with added vocal harmonies and a more prominent bassline.
2:30 - 2:38 final chorus continues with smooth fade out

Vocals: Male, clean, slightly processed with subtle reverb and delay.  Focus on clear diction and melodic phrasing.  Harmonies should be tight and supportive.

Lyrics:
[Verse 1]
City lights are calling, a vibrant hue
Lost in the rhythm, something feels new
Heartbeat’s racing, a magnetic pull
Breaking the silence, feeling full

[Build]
Take a chance, let the moment shine
Leave your worries, cross the line

[Chorus]
Azure skyline, painted bright
Dancing in the shadows, bathed in light
Feel the energy, set your spirit free
This is our moment, for you and me

[Verse 2]
Every step a memory, etched in time
Chasing the future, leaving behind
The doubts and fears, the whispered lies
Reaching for the stars, with open eyes

[Chorus]
Azure skyline, painted bright
Dancing in the shadows, bathed in light
Feel the energy, set your spirit free
This is our moment, for you and me

Negative prompt: low quality, distorted vocals, out of tune vocals, bad timing, messy mix, muddy bass, harsh highs, old-fashioned arrangement, theatrical singing, opera vocals, excessive vibrato, abrupt ending, spoken outro, crackle, noise, clipping, overcompressed, random tempo changes, long silence.
The final 8 seconds must fade out smoothly and naturally. No abrupt ending. No spoken outro.
